TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-custom_Liu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hai u niyaro' a niyam u ciwkangan.
S.PHON: ħai u nijaro~uʡ a nijam u ʦiwkaŋan.
S.FORM: hai u niyaro' a niyam u ciwkangan.
S.PHON: ħai u nijaro~uʡ a nijam u ʦiwkaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 是的,長光是我們的部落.
Yes, Ciwkangan is our tribe.

S.FORM: unini sa'an a ciwkangan hananay a niyaro' e ca'ay ka 'ca ka mitengil tu suwal nu kakita'an itiyaiho.
S.PHON: unini saʡan a ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj a nijaro~uʡ ə ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka mitəŋiɾ tu suwaɾ nu kakitaʡan itijaiħo~u.
S.FORM: unini sa'an a ciwkangan hananay a niyaro' e ca'ay ka 'ca ka mitengil tu suwal nu kakita'an itiyaiho.
S.PHON: unini saʡan a ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj a nijaro~uʡ ə ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka mitəŋiɾ tu suwaɾ nu kakitaʡan itijaiħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 所謂這個長光部落呢,過去而言,絕對不會不聽首領的話.

TRANSL.notes: Af for the so-called Ciwkangan Tribe, in the past, (we) would never disobey the chief.

S.TRANSL: Af for the so-called Ciwkangan Tribe, in the past, would never disobey the chief.

S.FORM: anu ira ku salifung anu ira ku pitapuh tu omah ma 'emin i kakita'an a misanga' tura romi'ad tura hatiraay.
S.PHON: anu ira ku saɾifuŋ anu ira ku pitapuħ tu o~umaħ ma ʡəmin i kakitaʡan a misaŋaʡ tura ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tura ħatiraaj.
S.FORM: anu ira ku salifung anu ira ku pitapuh tu omah ma 'emin i kakita'an a misanga' tura romi'ad tura hatiraay.
S.PHON: anu ira ku saɾifuŋ anu ira ku pitapuħ tu o~umaħ ma ʡəmin i kakitaʡan a misaŋaʡ tura ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tura ħatiraaj.

TRANSL.notes: 如果有瘟疫,如果要重新耕作,全部由首領支配時間(對於這些工作).

S.TRANSL: 如果有瘟疫,如果要重新耕作,全部由首領支配時間 .
If there was a plague, if people needed to re-cultivate the land, the chief would assign the work to people.

S.FORM: pakaorad pakacidal hatiraay saka.
S.PHON: pakao~uraɬ~ɮ pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ħatiraaj saka.
S.FORM: pakaorad pakacidal hatiraay saka.
S.PHON: pakao~uraɬ~ɮ pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ħatiraaj saka.
S.TRANSL: 祈雨、祈太陽,都是如此.
This was also true of praying for rain and the sun.

S.FORM: u pakayniay itini niyaro' haw i adihay ku paysin hananay.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj itini nijaro~uʡ ħaw i aɬ~ɮiħaj ku pajsin ħananaj.
S.FORM: u pakayniay itini niyaro' haw i adihay ku paysin hananay.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj itini nijaro~uʡ ħaw i aɬ~ɮiħaj ku pajsin ħananaj.

TRANSL.notes: 從這個部落(情境)呢,禁忌很多.

S.TRANSL: 從這個部落 呢,禁忌很多.
There were many taboos in the tribe.

S.FORM: anu ira ku cimapatayay nanay ca'ay ka 'ca ka e paysin ku niyaro'.
S.PHON: anu ira ku ʦimapatajaj nanaj ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka ə pajsin ku nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: anu ira ku cimapatayay nanay ca'ay ka 'ca ka e paysin ku niyaro'.
S.PHON: anu ira ku ʦimapatajaj nanaj ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka ə pajsin ku nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: 如果有過世的人家,部落絕對不會沒有禁忌.
If someone died, there would be taboos in the tribe.

S.FORM: ca'ay kanga'ay malingad hatiraay itiyaho ku nu tu'asho.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ħatiraaj itijaħo~u ku nu tuʡasħo~u.
S.FORM: ca'ay kanga'ay malingad hatiraay itiyaho ku nu tu'asho.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ħatiraaj itijaħo~u ku nu tuʡasħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 不能去工作,從前古老時候是如此.
People couldn't work then.

S.FORM: sa mi anu makedal awa ku 'orad paka'orad anini anu sa paka'orad ku finawlan.
S.PHON: sa mi anu makəɬ~ɮaɾ awa ku ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ anini anu sa pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ku finawɾan.
S.FORM: sa mi anu makedal awa ku 'orad paka'orad anini anu sa paka'orad ku finawlan.
S.PHON: sa mi anu makəɬ~ɮaɾ awa ku ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ anini anu sa pakaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ku finawɾan.

TRANSL.notes: 如果乾旱,沒有下雨,如果今天要祈雨的話,部落組織(動員)祈雨.

S.TRANSL: 如果乾旱,沒有下雨,如果今天要祈雨的話,部落組織 祈雨.
If there was a dought and it didn't rain, if people needed to pray for rain, the society would pray for rain.

S.FORM: luma'oc ku u finawlan atu lakacaw.
S.PHON: ɾumaʡo~uʦ ku u finawɾan atu ɾakaʦaw.
S.FORM: luma'oc ku u finawlan atu lakacaw.
S.PHON: ɾumaʡo~uʦ ku u finawɾan atu ɾakaʦaw.
S.TRANSL: 聚集部落組織和婦女會.
The society and women's association would assemble.

S.FORM: tayni i riyar a mitiyati' tu nanum a pakaorad.
S.PHON: tajni i rijar a mitijatiʡ tu nanum a pakao~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: tayni i riyar a mitiyati' tu nanum a pakaorad.
S.PHON: tajni i rijar a mitijatiʡ tu nanum a pakao~uraɬ~ɮ.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)到海邊去拍打海水,祈雨.

S.TRANSL: 到海邊去拍打海水,祈雨.

TRANSL.notes: (They) would go to the sea, tapping the sea water and praying for rain.

S.TRANSL: would go to the sea, tapping the sea water and praying for rain.

S.FORM: hatiraay ku nu itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku nu itijaajħo~u.
S.FORM: hatiraay ku nu itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku nu itijaajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 從前是這樣做的.
This is how things were done in the past.

S.FORM: sa pakayn itini i rakat nu orip nu 'amis nu mara'oday a ma takupay nu niyam u kasararem i matini i.
S.PHON: sa pakajn itini i rakat nu o~urip nu ʡamis nu maraʡo~uɬ~ɮaj a ma takupaj nu nijam u kasararəm i matini i.
S.FORM: sa pakayn itini i rakat nu orip nu 'amis nu mara'oday a ma takupay nu niyam u kasararem i matini i.
S.PHON: sa pakajn itini i rakat nu o~urip nu ʡamis nu maraʡo~uɬ~ɮaj a ma takupaj nu nijam u kasararəm i matini i.
S.TRANSL: 所以,從阿美族的生活過程中,我們這一代晚輩所接觸的、所趕上的.
From the life of Amis, what the younger generations see and keep abreast of.

S.FORM: watah karorayantu ku teloc.
S.PHON: wataħ karo~urajantu ku təɾo~uʦ.
S.FORM: watah karorayantu ku teloc.
S.PHON: wataħ karo~urajantu ku təɾo~uʦ.

TRANSL.notes: 哎呀,(當時)我們這些後代真辛苦.

S.TRANSL: 哎呀, 我們這些後代真辛苦.
Alas, the offsprings are industrious.

S.FORM: karorayantu nu kakita'an ku demak nu niyaro' hananay.
S.PHON: karo~urajantu nu kakitaʡan ku ɬ~ɮəmak nu nijaro~uʡ ħananaj.
S.FORM: karorayantu nu kakita'an ku demak nu niyaro' hananay.
S.PHON: karo~urajantu nu kakitaʡan ku ɬ~ɮəmak nu nijaro~uʡ ħananaj.
S.TRANSL: 頭目為了部落的事務而辛苦.
The chief worked hard for the tribal matters.

S.FORM: adihay ku tatayalen tu sakitini niyaro'.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj ku tatajaɾən tu sakitini nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: adihay ku tatayalen tu sakitini niyaro'.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj ku tatajaɾən tu sakitini nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: 關於部落要作的工作很多.
There was much tribal work.

S.FORM: anu masama'antu ma matini kuni kaawa ku hociyo awa ku ma'an ku nani fafaway haw.
S.PHON: anu masamaʡantu ma matini kuni kaawa ku ħo~uʦijo~u awa ku maʡan ku nani fafawaj ħaw.
S.FORM: anu masama'antu ma matini kuni kaawa ku hociyo awa ku ma'an ku nani fafaway haw.
S.PHON: anu masamaʡantu ma matini kuni kaawa ku ħo~uʦijo~u awa ku maʡan ku nani fafawaj ħaw.

TRANSL.notes: (像現在)不知如何,從中央(機關)都沒有補助,什麼也沒有.

S.TRANSL: 不知如何,從中央 都沒有補助,什麼也沒有.
There are no subsidies from the government now.

S.FORM: sahtu tu unu finawlan ku tayal unu kapah a palifet ku tayal misakilang miowai.
S.PHON: saħtu tu unu finawɾan ku tajaɾ unu kapaħ a paɾifət ku tajaɾ misakiɾaŋ mio~uwai.
S.FORM: sahtu tu unu finawlan ku tayal unu kapah a palifet ku tayal misakilang miowai.
S.PHON: saħtu tu unu finawɾan ku tajaɾ unu kapaħ a paɾifət ku tajaɾ misakiɾaŋ mio~uwai.
S.TRANSL: 現在只有青年全部都在部落辛勞的工作,砍伐、採藤..
The youths worked hard in the tribe, logging and picking vines.

S.FORM: hatira ku itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatira ku itijaajħo~u.
S.FORM: hatira ku itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatira ku itijaajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 過去就是這樣.
That is how the past was.

S.FORM: anu mara'od kunini u unini u kailisinan anu han aca i roma satu pitu a romi'ad ku la'oc nu finawlan a malalakaw.
S.PHON: anu maraʡo~uɬ~ɮ kunini u unini u kaiɾisinan anu ħan aʦa i ro~uma satu pitu a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ku ɾaʡo~uʦ nu finawɾan a maɾaɾakaw.
S.FORM: anu mara'od kunini u unini u kailisinan anu han aca i roma satu pitu a romi'ad ku la'oc nu finawlan a malalakaw.
S.PHON: anu maraʡo~uɬ~ɮ kunini u unini u kaiɾisinan anu ħan aʦa i ro~uma satu pitu a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ku ɾaʡo~uʦ nu finawɾan a maɾaɾakaw.
S.TRANSL: 如果到了豐年祭的季節,其次,有七天組織會集合,籌備部落一切活動.
When the harvest festival comes, next, the society would assemble for seven days to arrange all the tribal activities.

S.FORM: misa'opo tu datung a mi kilim tu mi tu papacuken.
S.PHON: misaʡo~upo~u tu ɬ~ɮatuŋ a mi kiɾim tu mi tu papaʦukən.
S.FORM: misa'opo tu datung a mi kilim tu mi tu papacuken.
S.PHON: misaʡo~upo~u tu ɬ~ɮatuŋ a mi kiɾim tu mi tu papaʦukən.

TRANSL.notes: 例如:集中薪柴,找尋要殺的(豬).

S.TRANSL: 例如:集中薪柴,找尋要殺的 .

TRANSL.notes: For example, gathering woods and looking for (pigs) to kill.

S.TRANSL: For example, gathering woods and looking for to kill.

S.FORM: hananay matira ku demak nu itini tu niyaro' itiyaho saka.
S.PHON: ħananaj matira ku ɬ~ɮəmak nu itini tu nijaro~uʡ itijaħo~u saka.
S.FORM: hananay matira ku demak nu itini tu niyaro' itiyaho saka.
S.PHON: ħananaj matira ku ɬ~ɮəmak nu itini tu nijaro~uʡ itijaħo~u saka.
S.TRANSL: 過去部落的情形就是如此.
That's how the tribe was in the past.

S.FORM: masarucud ku tayal.
S.PHON: masaruʦuɬ~ɮ ku tajaɾ.
S.FORM: masarucud ku tayal.
S.PHON: masaruʦuɬ~ɮ ku tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼工作很順利呢?
Why was the work smooth?

S.FORM: masarucud ku demak tuya romi'ad han.
S.PHON: masaruʦuɬ~ɮ ku ɬ~ɮəmak tuja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħan.
S.FORM: masarucud ku demak tuya romi'ad han.
S.PHON: masaruʦuɬ~ɮ ku ɬ~ɮəmak tuja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħan.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼事情當天都很順利呢?
Why was the thing smooth on that day?

S.FORM: iratu kita machunpi nu.
S.PHON: iratu kita maʦħunpi nu.
S.FORM: iratu kita machunpi nu.
S.PHON: iratu kita maʦħunpi nu.

TRANSL.notes: (因為)我們早有準備.

S.TRANSL: 我們早有準備.

TRANSL.notes: (Because) we had been prepared.

S.TRANSL: we had been prepared.

S.FORM: hiya nu pi lekakawa nu hiya nu kakita'an atu kapah.
S.PHON: ħija nu pi ɾəkakawa nu ħija nu kakitaʡan atu kapaħ.
S.FORM: hiya nu pi lekakawa nu hiya nu kakita'an atu kapah.
S.PHON: ħija nu pi ɾəkakawa nu ħija nu kakitaʡan atu kapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 部落裡首領和青年們都策劃完善.
The chief and the youths had made proper arrangements.

S.FORM: misa'opo tu ma'ama'an saka sarucud satu ku tayal.
S.PHON: misaʡo~upo~u tu maʡamaʡan saka saruʦuɬ~ɮ satu ku tajaɾ.
S.FORM: misa'opo tu ma'ama'an saka sarucud satu ku tayal.
S.PHON: misaʡo~upo~u tu maʡamaʡan saka saruʦuɬ~ɮ satu ku tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 任何事都集中處理,所以工作很順利.
Everything was arranged so the work was smooth.

S.FORM: malepuntu ku demak.
S.PHON: maɾəpuntu ku ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.FORM: malepuntu ku demak.
S.PHON: maɾəpuntu ku ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: 事情就完成了.
The thing was done.

S.FORM: hatiraay.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj.
S.FORM: hatiraay.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj.
S.TRANSL: 事情是這樣的.
That's it.

S.FORM: saka pakayniay itini i demak nu 'amis mafana'ay mima'an tunini u lising atu unini nu kawasan hananay.
S.PHON: saka pakajniaj itini i ɬ~ɮəmak nu ʡamis mafanaʡaj mimaʡan tunini u ɾisiŋ atu unini nu kawasan ħananaj.
S.FORM: saka pakayniay itini i demak nu 'amis mafana'ay mima'an tunini u lising atu unini nu kawasan hananay.
S.PHON: saka pakajniaj itini i ɬ~ɮəmak nu ʡamis mafanaʡaj mimaʡan tunini u ɾisiŋ atu unini nu kawasan ħananaj.
S.TRANSL: 所以從阿美族的事務裡,我們怎麼知道這個祭祀跟神的這件事?
From Amis matters, how do we know worship and God?

S.FORM: awaay ku fana' unu matu'asay a kawas.
S.PHON: awaaj ku fanaʡ unu matuʡasaj a kawas.
S.FORM: awaay ku fana' unu matu'asay a kawas.
S.PHON: awaaj ku fanaʡ unu matuʡasaj a kawas.
S.TRANSL: 我們一點都不知,這個祖先的神.
We know nothing about the ancestors' God.

S.FORM: pa pakayni sa'an itini i piedaw pakayni sa'an itini i pi hay piedaw ku tudung nu pisatapangan a a malalakaw tu sapisalisin.
S.PHON: pa pakajni saʡan itini i piəɬ~ɮaw pakajni saʡan itini i pi ħaj piəɬ~ɮaw ku tuɬ~ɮuŋ nu pisatapaŋan a a maɾaɾakaw tu sapisaɾisin.
S.FORM: pa pakayni sa'an itini i piedaw pakayni sa'an itini i pi hay piedaw ku tudung nu pisatapangan a a malalakaw tu sapisalisin.
S.PHON: pa pakajni saʡan itini i piəɬ~ɮaw pakajni saʡan itini i pi ħaj piəɬ~ɮaw ku tuɬ~ɮuŋ nu pisatapaŋan a a maɾaɾakaw tu sapisaɾisin.

TRANSL.notes: 只有從(這巫師)作法事可看出,就代表開始籌備祭祀的種種事務.

S.TRANSL: 只有從 作法事可看出,就代表開始籌備祭祀的種種事務.

TRANSL.notes: The ritual (by the wizard) means the start of the preparation for worship and other relevant activities.

S.TRANSL: The ritual means the start of the preparation for worship and other relevant activities.

S.FORM: anu sasalisinen ca'ay ka'ca ka e e ma'emintu a masa naka malaccay ku ngasaw.
S.PHON: anu sasaɾisinən ʦaʡaj kaʡʦa ka ə ə maʡəmintu a masa naka maɾaʦʦaj ku ŋasaw.
S.FORM: anu sasalisinen ca'ay ka'ca ka e e ma'emintu a masa naka malaccay ku ngasaw.
S.PHON: anu sasaɾisinən ʦaʡaj kaʡʦa ka ə ə maʡəmintu a masa naka maɾaʦʦaj ku ŋasaw.

TRANSL.notes: 如果要做祭拜儀式,各氏族(的成員)絕對不會不團結.

S.TRANSL: 如果要做祭拜儀式,各氏族 絕對不會不團結.
During the worship, all the clans would be united.

S.FORM: u ngasaw sa'an adihay ku ngasaw nu ciwkangan hananay.
S.PHON: u ŋasaw saʡan aɬ~ɮiħaj ku ŋasaw nu ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj.
S.FORM: u ngasaw sa'an adihay ku ngasaw nu ciwkangan hananay.
S.PHON: u ŋasaw saʡan aɬ~ɮiħaj ku ŋasaw nu ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj.
S.TRANSL: 氏族呢,長光部落很多氏族,這樣子.
There are many clans in Ciwkangan.

S.FORM: sa ngasangasangasawitu ku pisalisin.
S.PHON: sa ŋasaŋasaŋasawitu ku pisaɾisin.
S.FORM: sa ngasangasangasawitu ku pisalisin.
S.PHON: sa ŋasaŋasaŋasawitu ku pisaɾisin.
S.TRANSL: 各氏族都各自祭拜了.
Each clan would worship.

S.FORM: sa matiraay saka.
S.PHON: sa matiraaj saka.
S.FORM: sa matiraay saka.
S.PHON: sa matiraaj saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以就是這樣子的.
That's it.

S.FORM: pa matini satu haw i anu ira ku adadaay anu u papakawasen ca'ay ka 'ca ka mipacuk tu fafuy ta paka'en tu kawas a misalisin.
S.PHON: pa matini satu ħaw i anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj anu u papakawasən ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka mipaʦuk tu fafuj ta pakaʡən tu kawas a misaɾisin.
S.FORM: pa matini satu haw i anu ira ku adadaay anu u papakawasen ca'ay ka 'ca ka mipacuk tu fafuy ta paka'en tu kawas a misalisin.
S.PHON: pa matini satu ħaw i anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj anu u papakawasən ʦaʡaj ka ʡʦa ka mipaʦuk tu fafuj ta pakaʡən tu kawas a misaɾisin.
S.TRANSL: 現在呢,如果有人生病而即將要被施法,絕對不會不殺豬,供奉神明.
Now, if someone is sick and is to be cast a spell on, people would kill pigs to worship God.

S.FORM: u matiraay saka.
S.PHON: u matiraaj saka.
S.FORM: u matiraay saka.
S.PHON: u matiraaj saka.
S.TRANSL: 是這樣子的.
That's it.

S.FORM: anu ira ku adadaay haw i iraay ku cikawasay nu ciwkangan.
S.PHON: anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħaw i iraaj ku ʦikawasaj nu ʦiwkaŋan.
S.FORM: anu ira ku adadaay haw i iraay ku cikawasay nu ciwkangan.
S.PHON: anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ħaw i iraaj ku ʦikawasaj nu ʦiwkaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 如果有人生病,長光部落有巫師.
If someone is sick, there are wizards in Ciwkangan.

S.FORM: ura sa'an nura ciwkangan hananay maedeng a ira ku mamute'tep kiya ku tudung nu cikawasay nu niyaro'.
S.PHON: ura saʡan nura ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj maəɬ~ɮəŋ a ira ku mamutəʡtəp kija ku tuɬ~ɮuŋ nu ʦikawasaj nu nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: ura sa'an nura ciwkangan hananay maedeng a ira ku mamute'tep kiya ku tudung nu cikawasay nu niyaro'.
S.PHON: ura saʡan nura ʦiwkaŋan ħananaj maəɬ~ɮəŋ a ira ku mamutəʡtəp kija ku tuɬ~ɮuŋ nu ʦikawasaj nu nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: 這個長光部落呢,有十幾位巫師,負責部落的事務.
In Ciwkangan, there are more than ten wizards who are in charge of tribal matters.

S.FORM: anu ira ku adadaay matahidang masayil.
S.PHON: anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ masajiɾ.
S.FORM: anu ira ku adadaay matahidang masayil.
S.PHON: anu ira ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ masajiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 如果有人生病,就被邀請去被施法.
If someone is sick, he would be invited and a spell would be cast on him/her..

S.FORM: mapa hay mi sayil ta.
S.PHON: mapa ħaj mi sajiɾ ta.
S.FORM: mapa hay mi sayil ta.
S.PHON: mapa ħaj mi sajiɾ ta.
S.TRANSL: 作法.
To cast a spell.

S.FORM: anu manga'ay manga'ay.
S.PHON: anu maŋaʡaj maŋaʡaj.
S.FORM: anu manga'ay manga'ay.
S.PHON: anu maŋaʡaj maŋaʡaj.

TRANSL.notes: 如果能(治)好,會好.

S.TRANSL: 如果能 好,會好.
If s/he can be cured, s/he would recover.

S.FORM: anu malemed malemed.
S.PHON: anu maɾəməɬ~ɮ maɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: anu malemed malemed.
S.PHON: anu maɾəməɬ~ɮ maɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 運氣來的時候,運氣就好.
If s/he is lucky, s/he is lucky.

S.FORM: sanay ku nu matu'asayho.
S.PHON: sanaj ku nu matuʡasajħo~u.
S.FORM: sanay ku nu matu'asayho.
S.PHON: sanaj ku nu matuʡasajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 過去的祖先是這樣子的.
The ancestors were like this.

S.FORM: u ising hananay awa ku paisingay itiyaho.
S.PHON: u isiŋ ħananaj awa ku paisiŋaj itijaħo~u.
S.FORM: u ising hananay awa ku paisingay itiyaho.
S.PHON: u isiŋ ħananaj awa ku paisiŋaj itijaħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 至於醫生呢,過去都沒有人給醫生看.
None would consult a doctor in the past.

S.FORM: sahtu tu pisayil.
S.PHON: saħtu tu pisajiɾ.
S.FORM: sahtu tu pisayil.
S.PHON: saħtu tu pisajiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 全部都靠施法.
All depend on spells.

S.FORM: u pipa a mi malaccay ku ngasaw.
S.PHON: u pipa a mi maɾaʦʦaj ku ŋasaw.
S.FORM: u pipa a mi malaccay ku ngasaw.
S.PHON: u pipa a mi maɾaʦʦaj ku ŋasaw.
S.TRANSL: 各氏族團結一致.
All the clans were united.

S.FORM: a malaccay ku pakayniay itini i salising hananay.
S.PHON: a maɾaʦʦaj ku pakajniaj itini i saɾisiŋ ħananaj.
S.FORM: a malaccay ku pakayniay itini i salising hananay.
S.PHON: a maɾaʦʦaj ku pakajniaj itini i saɾisiŋ ħananaj.
S.TRANSL: 從每個儀式都是一樣的.

TRANSL.notes: From the so-called worship, (they were) united.

S.TRANSL: From the so-called worship, united.

S.FORM: matiraay.
S.PHON: matiraaj.
S.FORM: matiraay.
S.PHON: matiraaj.
S.TRANSL: 是那樣.
That's it.

S.FORM: u roma satu haw i anini sa makedal ku kaliwmahan awa ku orad.
S.PHON: u ro~uma satu ħaw i anini sa makəɬ~ɮaɾ ku kaɾiwmaħan awa ku o~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: u roma satu haw i anini sa makedal ku kaliwmahan awa ku orad.
S.PHON: u ro~uma satu ħaw i anini sa makəɬ~ɮaɾ ku kaɾiwmaħan awa ku o~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 其次呢,現在農忙時期,非常乾旱,沒有下雨.
Next, it is cultivation season now. There is a drought; it doens't rain.

S.FORM: lumuwad ku finawlan.
S.PHON: ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ ku finawɾan.
S.FORM: lumuwad ku finawlan.
S.PHON: ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ ku finawɾan.
S.TRANSL: 部落大動員.
The society would be mobilized.

S.FORM: pala'oc kunini u kakita'an.
S.PHON: paɾaʡo~uʦ kunini u kakitaʡan.
S.FORM: pala'oc kunini u kakita'an.
S.PHON: paɾaʡo~uʦ kunini u kakitaʡan.

TRANSL.notes: 集合(氏族的)首領.

S.TRANSL: 集合 首領.

TRANSL.notes: The chiefs (of the clans) would assemble.

S.TRANSL: The chiefs would assemble.

S.FORM: uni sa'an una kapah u tuluc haw i tayni i sacpo' itini i makuta'ay tiya tefun nu fulad hananay.
S.PHON: uni saʡan una kapaħ u tuɾuʦ ħaw i tajni i saʦpo~uʡ itini i makutaʡaj tija təfun nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj.
S.FORM: uni sa'an una kapah u tuluc haw i tayni i sacpo' itini i makuta'ay tiya tefun nu fulad hananay.
S.PHON: uni saʡan una kapaħ u tuɾuʦ ħaw i tajni i saʦpo~uʡ itini i makutaʡaj tija təfun nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj.

TRANSL.notes: 年齡層最低的青少年(們)來秀姑巒溪,在大港口這裡,那個月洞(月井).

S.TRANSL: 年齡層最低的青少年 來秀姑巒溪,在大港口這裡,那個月洞 .
The youths would come to Xiuguluan River, here at Makuta'ay, the so-called Moon Well.

S.FORM: i la'enu' tiya tefun nu fulad hananay uranan ku saka pipakaorad.
S.PHON: i ɾaʡənuʡ tija təfun nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj uranan ku saka pipakao~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: i la'enu' tiya tefun nu fulad hananay uranan ku saka pipakaorad.
S.PHON: i ɾaʡənuʡ tija təfun nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj uranan ku saka pipakao~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 在下面,有那個所謂的月洞,所以從那個月洞來祈雨.

TRANSL.notes: There is the so-called Moon Well below; (so we) pray for rain there.

S.TRANSL: There is the so-called Moon Well below; pray for rain there.

S.FORM: anu mamalemed mamaorad maorad.
S.PHON: anu mamaɾəməɬ~ɮ mamao~uraɬ~ɮ mao~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: anu mamalemed mamaorad maorad.
S.PHON: anu mamaɾəməɬ~ɮ mamao~uraɬ~ɮ mao~uraɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 如果運氣好,要下雨的話,就會下雨.
If they were lucky, it would rain.

S.FORM: hatira ku nu itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatira ku nu itijaajħo~u.
S.FORM: hatira ku nu itiyaayho.
S.PHON: ħatira ku nu itijaajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 過去是這樣子的.
The past is like this.

S.FORM: sa anu adihay ku adadaay nu niyaro' u malalisanay masamama'anay a adada haw i e malekaltu ku mama nu kapah.
S.PHON: sa anu aɬ~ɮiħaj ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj nu nijaro~uʡ u maɾaɾisanaj masamamaʡanaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ħaw i ə maɾəkaɾtu ku mama nu kapaħ.
S.FORM: sa anu adihay ku adadaay nu niyaro' u malalisanay masamama'anay a adada haw i e malekaltu ku mama nu kapah.
S.PHON: sa anu aɬ~ɮiħaj ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj nu nijaro~uʡ u maɾaɾisanaj masamamaʡanaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ħaw i ə maɾəkaɾtu ku mama nu kapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 如果部落有很多人生病,發燒感冒的,任何疾病,青年之父這輩就被招喚.
If many people in the tribe were sick or had a fever, or any disease, the fathers of the youths would be called.

S.FORM: mi salifun kita anini sa.
S.PHON: mi saɾifun kita anini sa.
S.FORM: mi salifun kita anini sa.
S.PHON: mi saɾifun kita anini sa.
S.TRANSL: 我們現在實施防疫.
We carried out epidemic prevention.

S.FORM: u kapah satu haw i milidafak miala tu e oway.
S.PHON: u kapaħ satu ħaw i miɾiɬ~ɮafak miaɾa tu ə o~uwaj.
S.FORM: u kapah satu haw i milidafak miala tu e oway.
S.PHON: u kapaħ satu ħaw i miɾiɬ~ɮafak miaɾa tu ə o~uwaj.
S.TRANSL: 年輕一輩呢,早飯前去摘藤.
The youths picked vines before breakfast.

S.FORM: u sapaluwi' tiraw i lawac nu lalan u kapah tu safasafa haw i miala tuya aledu.
S.PHON: u sapaɾuwiʡ tiraw i ɾawaʦ nu ɾaɾan u kapaħ tu safasafa ħaw i miaɾa tuja aɾəɬ~ɮu.
S.FORM: u sapaluwi' tiraw i lawac nu lalan u kapah tu safasafa haw i miala tuya aledu.
S.PHON: u sapaɾuwiʡ tiraw i ɾawaʦ nu ɾaɾan u kapaħ tu safasafa ħaw i miaɾa tuja aɾəɬ~ɮu.

TRANSL.notes: 年齡層最小的青年去摘aledu(某植物).

S.TRANSL: 年齡層最小的青年去摘aledu .

TRANSL.notes: The youths picked Aledu (some kind of plant).

S.TRANSL: The youths picked Aledu .

S.FORM: e maharek a maranam masa'opoitu.
S.PHON: ə maħarək a maranam masaʡo~upo~uitu.
S.FORM: e maharek a maranam masa'opoitu.
S.PHON: ə maħarək a maranam masaʡo~upo~uitu.
S.TRANSL: 早餐後就集合了.
They gathered after breakfast.

S.FORM: uya i curukhan ku luma' a misitatatata.
S.PHON: uja i ʦurukħan ku ɾumaʡ a misitatatata.
S.FORM: uya i curukhan ku luma' a misitatatata.
S.PHON: uja i ʦurukħan ku ɾumaʡ a misitatatata.
S.TRANSL: 那個呢,挨家挨戶的作法.
Spells were casting from door to door.

S.FORM: a mitiyati' tu lumaluma' ci'ici'iw nu luma'.
S.PHON: a mitijatiʡ tu ɾumaɾumaʡ ʦiʡiʦiʡiw nu ɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: a mitiyati' tu lumaluma' ci'ici'iw nu luma'.
S.PHON: a mitijatiʡ tu ɾumaɾumaʡ ʦiʡiʦiʡiw nu ɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 拍打每家每戶的牆角.
The corners of every house were tapped.

S.FORM: a mi ku'ku' tuya palafuay tiya akuma hananay.
S.PHON: a mi kuʡkuʡ tuja paɾafuaj tija akuma ħananaj.
S.FORM: a mi ku'ku' tuya palafuay tiya akuma hananay.
S.PHON: a mi kuʡkuʡ tuja paɾafuaj tija akuma ħananaj.
S.TRANSL: 趕走那些惡魔,也就是日本所說的akuma這樣.
To expel the demons, the so-called 'akuma'.

S.FORM: hatiraay ku nu matu'asay miku'ku' tu lifun a misalifun. XXXX
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku nu matuʡasaj mikuʡkuʡ tu ɾifun a misaɾifun. xxxx
S.FORM: hatiraay ku nu matu'asay miku'ku' tu lifun a misalifun. XXXX
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku nu matuʡasaj mikuʡkuʡ tu ɾifun a misaɾifun. xxxx
S.TRANSL: 如此,祖先過去驅魔.
That is how the ancestors expeled the demons.

S.FORM: hatiraay sa.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj sa.
S.FORM: hatiraay sa.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj sa.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣.
That's it.

S.FORM: u pakayniay itini i kalalakaw hananay nu matu'asay turu misaluma' sanay wa.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj itini i kaɾaɾakaw ħananaj nu matuʡasaj turu misaɾumaʡ sanaj wa.
S.FORM: u pakayniay itini i kalalakaw hananay nu matu'asay turu misaluma' sanay wa.
S.PHON: u pakajniaj itini i kaɾaɾakaw ħananaj nu matuʡasaj turu misaɾumaʡ sanaj wa.

TRANSL.notes: 過去老人家所說的kalalakaw就是蓋房子(「分家」)之意.

S.TRANSL: 過去老人家所說的kalalakaw就是蓋房子 之意.
As for what the elders mean by 'kalalakw' is to build houses.

S.FORM: maemintu u kapah ku tahira i mama nu kapah ku citudungay a mi.
S.PHON: maəmintu u kapaħ ku taħira i mama nu kapaħ ku ʦituɬ~ɮuŋaj a mi.
S.FORM: maemintu u kapah ku tahira i mama nu kapah ku citudungay a mi.
S.PHON: maəmintu u kapaħ ku taħira i mama nu kapaħ ku ʦituɬ~ɮuŋaj a mi.

TRANSL.notes: 全部由青年輩到青年之父(部落組織)負責.

S.TRANSL: 全部由青年輩到青年之父 負責.
All the things were taken care of by the youths and their fathers.

S.FORM: e haratengtu saka ciluma' nu caciluma'.
S.PHON: ə ħaratəŋtu saka ʦiɾumaʡ nu ʦaʦiɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: e haratengtu saka ciluma' nu caciluma'.
S.PHON: ə ħaratəŋtu saka ʦiɾumaʡ nu ʦaʦiɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 計畫分家的人所住的房子.
Planning the houses for those would like to divide up family property.

S.FORM: anu papaoway mioway anini lumuwad milafin itini i cifutingay.
S.PHON: anu papao~uwaj mio~uwaj anini ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ miɾafin itini i ʦifutiŋaj.
S.FORM: anu papaoway mioway anini lumuwad milafin itini i cifutingay.
S.PHON: anu papao~uwaj mio~uwaj anini ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ miɾafin itini i ʦifutiŋaj.
S.TRANSL: 如果要摘藤,今天就要出發,在水姆丁過夜.
If people want to pick vines, they have to set out today and stay overnight at Cifutingay.

S.FORM: tatusa sakatusa a rumi'ad minukaytu.
S.PHON: tatusa sakatusa a rumiʡaɬ~ɮ minukajtu.
S.FORM: tatusa sakatusa a rumi'ad minukaytu.
S.PHON: tatusa sakatusa a rumiʡaɬ~ɮ minukajtu.
S.TRANSL: 第二天就回來了.
They came back on the second day.

S.FORM: siowayen nu matu'asay.
S.PHON: sio~uwajən nu matuʡasaj.
S.FORM: siowayen nu matu'asay.
S.PHON: sio~uwajən nu matuʡasaj.
S.TRANSL: 老人家把藤加工.
The elders then processed the vines.

S.FORM: ta malepun kurira i haw maedengtu misaluma' saluma'tu.
S.PHON: ta maɾəpun kurira i ħaw maəɬ~ɮəŋtu misaɾumaʡ saɾumaʡtu.
S.FORM: ta malepun kurira i haw maedengtu misaluma' saluma'tu.
S.PHON: ta maɾəpun kurira i ħaw maəɬ~ɮəŋtu misaɾumaʡ saɾumaʡtu.
S.TRANSL: 加工完之後,足夠蓋房子,就蓋房子了.

TRANSL.notes: After it was done, it is sufficient to build a house, (so they) built a house.

S.TRANSL: After it was done, it is sufficient to build a house, built a house.

S.FORM: u kapah u finawlan ku misaluma'ay tu luma' pakayniay itini i hananay patiren tu luma'.
S.PHON: u kapaħ u finawɾan ku misaɾumaʡaj tu ɾumaʡ pakajniaj itini i ħananaj patirən tu ɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: u kapah u finawlan ku misaluma'ay tu luma' pakayniay itini i hananay patiren tu luma'.
S.PHON: u kapaħ u finawɾan ku misaɾumaʡaj tu ɾumaʡ pakajniaj itini i ħananaj patirən tu ɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 由部落青年從事蓋房子的任務.
The youths built houses.

S.FORM: ca'ay katekedhan nu luma' ku patiren tu luma'.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj katəkəɬ~ɮħan nu ɾumaʡ ku patirən tu ɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: ca'ay katekedhan nu luma' ku patiren tu luma'.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj katəkəɬ~ɮħan nu ɾumaʡ ku patirən tu ɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 不會私自蓋自己的房子.
People would not build houses on their own.

S.FORM: hatira ku itiyaayho a mapadapadang matira ku nu matu'asayho misaluma' sa.
S.PHON: ħatira ku itijaajħo~u a mapaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ matira ku nu matuʡasajħo~u misaɾumaʡ sa.
S.FORM: hatira ku itiyaayho a mapadapadang matira ku nu matu'asayho misaluma' sa.
S.PHON: ħatira ku itijaajħo~u a mapaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ matira ku nu matuʡasajħo~u misaɾumaʡ sa.
S.TRANSL: 過去是這樣,在蓋房子的時候,互相幫忙.
In the past, when building houses, people helped each other like this.

S.FORM: u hatini satu haw i u romatu ku shiday anini.
S.PHON: u ħatini satu ħaw i u ro~umatu ku sħiɬ~ɮaj anini.
S.FORM: u hatini satu haw i u romatu ku shiday anini.
S.PHON: u ħatini satu ħaw i u ro~umatu ku sħiɬ~ɮaj anini.
S.TRANSL: 在現在來說現在的時代大大的不同了.
It is different now.

S.FORM: maemintu unu paycian.
S.PHON: maəmintu unu pajʦian.
S.FORM: maemintu unu paycian.
S.PHON: maəmintu unu pajʦian.
S.TRANSL: 全部都是用錢.
Everything depends on money now.

S.FORM: ura ku saka sa'an hatira aca ku maku a pakafana' tu nu tu'asho a demak.
S.PHON: ura ku saka saʡan ħatira aʦa ku maku a pakafanaʡ tu nu tuʡasħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.FORM: ura ku saka sa'an hatira aca ku maku a pakafana' tu nu tu'asho a demak.
S.PHON: ura ku saka saʡan ħatira aʦa ku maku a pakafanaʡ tu nu tuʡasħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: 我所要敘述的過去事務就是那樣.
That is what I want to say about the past.

S.FORM: hatira aca ku suwal aku kira.
S.PHON: ħatira aʦa ku suwaɾ aku kira.
S.FORM: hatira aca ku suwal aku kira.
S.PHON: ħatira aʦa ku suwaɾ aku kira.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我所要講的.
That is what I want to say.
